summary: ClashSolverMoveDeviceVerticallyIntoSpaceAlongWallCommand — PDF "MOVE_VERTICALLY_INTO_SPACE". Slide along wall's vertical axis.
usecase: Wall-device vertical nudge that stays on the wall.
precondition: Active document; device FamilyInstance with Wall host.
postcondition: Zero or one MoveElement inside inner Transaction.
logictree:
1) Resolver_DeviceUniqueId required OR single selection.
2) Must be FamilyInstance with Wall host.
3) axis = Resolver_PreferUp ? +Z : -Z (walls are world-vertical in Revit's standard).
4) Delegate TryDirectionalMoveOnService.ProbeAndMove(doc, fi, axis, step_ft, threshold_ft, centreFallback=false).
5) Emit outcome.

preprompts: Raising or lowering wall-hosted device along wall vertical…
